holdings.infoBox: AVSD is an equity ETF with a total of 2131 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 1.23%, HSBC Holdings PLC ADR at 1.06%, Roche Holding AG at 1.02%, Novartis AG ADR at 0.83%, and Royal Bank of Canada at 0.81%.

overview.description: The Avantis Responsible International Equity ETF (AVSD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively invests in companies of all market capitalizations in developed markets outside of the US. Holdings are screened for multiple ESG metrics and selected based on fundamental criteria AVSD was launched on Mar 15, 2022 and is issued by American Century Investments.
